sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: SDHC SEC Filings - SMITH DOUGLAS HOMES CORP 10-K, 10-Q, 8-K Forms
feed.summary: This page provides a comprehensive resource for SMITH DOUGLAS HOMES (SDHC) SEC filings, including 10-K annual reports, 10-Q quarterly reports, 8-K material events, and insider trading forms. Each filing is accompanied by expert analysis from Rhea-AI, offering insights into potential stock performance impact, AI-generated summaries, sentiment and impact scores, and end-of-day stock performance data. The content highlights recent filings, such as the 2026 annual report outlining the company's Up-C structure and growth strategy, Q4 and full-year 2025 earnings results, and various institutional ownership disclosures.

feed.title: Pebblebrook Hotel Trust (NYSE:PEB) Price Target Raised to $14.00
feed.summary: Truist Financial has increased its price target for Pebblebrook Hotel Trust (NYSE:PEB) to $14.00 from $12.00, maintaining a "hold" rating, which suggests an 11.3% upside. Despite this, the consensus analyst rating for PEB is "Reduce," with an average target of $12.33, reflecting mixed opinions among analysts. The company recently surpassed Q4 EPS estimates and provided positive FY2026 EPS guidance.

feed.title: PUCO to review AEP request that could raise Ohio electric bills by $10 a month
feed.summary: Ohio utility regulators are meeting to discuss a request from American Electric Power (AEP) to increase electric rates, potentially raising customer bills by up to $10 a month. The Public Utilities Commission of Ohio (PUCO) is considering AEP's request to increase transmission charges, which cover electricity delivery costs. Despite a preliminary vote favoring AEP, significant opposition is anticipated at the hearing.

feed.title: Stryker names Nick Mead Vice President, Investor Relations
feed.summary: Stryker has appointed Nick Mead as Vice President, Investor Relations, effective May 1, 2026. Mead brings nearly 20 years of experience within Stryker, having held various leadership roles across multiple divisions. Concurrently, Jason Beach, the former VP, Finance and Investor Relations, has been named Vice President, Group Chief Financial Officer, MedSurg and Neurotechnology.

feed.title: Utilities: With Stocks Up Year to Date, Sector Is Delivering on Growth
feed.summary: Utility stocks have seen strong performance, with the Morningstar US Utilities Index up 5.25% in 2026 and nearly doubling since October 2023. While valuations are currently 7% overvalued, the sector is supported by robust earnings growth driven by clean energy, data center demand, manufacturing onshoring, and electrification. Morningstar highlights Edison International, Portland General Electric, and WEC Energy Group as top picks, expecting significant capital investments and annual earnings growth for these companies.

feed.title: Keurig Dr Pepper picks Peet’s CEO to helm coffee spinoff
feed.summary: Keurig Dr Pepper has appointed Rafael Oliveira, the current CEO of JDE Peet’s, to lead its coffee business as it moves towards a planned spinoff. This decision follows the completion of Keurig Dr Pepper's $18 billion acquisition of Peet's, which will enable the company to separate its beverage and coffee operations into two independent entities. Oliveira will become CEO of the newly formed Global Coffee Co., which will include the Keurig and Green Mountain brands, with the aim for a full split by the end of the year.

feed.title: Chevron-Microsoft Deal Powers $7B Texas AI Energy Project
feed.summary: Chevron, Microsoft, and investment firm Engine No. 1 are in exclusive talks for a $7 billion AI-driven energy project in West Texas. This proposed natural gas-fired power plant, expected to generate 2,500 MW, aims to supply power for a massive data center campus with Microsoft acting as an anchor customer. The "behind-the-meter" design integrates Permian Basin gas production directly into power generation, streamlining the supply chain and de-risking the project.

feed.title: UnitedHealth Group Incorporated (UNH): Billionaire Paul Tudor Jones Is Loading Up on This Stock
feed.summary: UnitedHealth Group (NYSE: UNH) is a significant holding in billionaire Paul Tudor Jones's Tudor Investment Corp, with the fund recently increasing its stake by over 13,000%. The company is actively investing $1.6 billion in AI for 2026 to improve Optum margins and automate claims, and it is currently trading at a lower Forward P/E ratio compared to its historical average, making it an attractive option for institutional investors.

feed.title: Campbell's Cream of Mushroom Soup: Iconic Comfort Food Driving Steady Consumer Demand in North American Markets
feed.summary: Campbell's Cream of Mushroom Soup continues to be a strong performer for Campbell Soup Company, maintaining steady consumer demand in North American markets due to its enduring appeal as a comfort food staple. The product's versatility, long history, and strategic importance contribute to its stable sales and provide resilience for the company amidst evolving consumer packaged goods trends and economic pressures, making it attractive to investors.

feed.title: Communication Services: Alphabet and Meta’s Moats Remain Despite Escalating AI Investments
feed.summary: Morningstar maintains wide moat ratings for Alphabet and Meta, despite significant AI investment plans ($180 billion and $125 billion respectively in 2026), citing the strength of their core ad businesses. These investments are seen as enhancing user engagement and ad targeting. The article also highlights picks in the communication services sector, including Comcast, Walt Disney, and Omnicom, each with specific reasons for their valuation and potential growth despite market concerns.

feed.title: Planning an Outdoor Digging Project this Spring? Call 811 Before You Dig to Avoid Repair Costs Averaging $3,500
feed.summary: PG&E is reminding homeowners in Northern and Central California to call 811 two business days before any digging project to prevent damage to underground utility lines. This cautionary message comes after over 1,200 incidents in 2025 where utility lines were damaged due to digging, with repairs averaging $3,500. April is National Safe Digging Month, emphasizing the importance of this free and essential safety step to protect individuals, property, and prevent costly repairs.

feed.title: Why Costco is winning the gas war by refusing to behave like a normal gas station
feed.summary: Costco's membership-based fuel program consistently offers lower gas prices, typically $0.05 to $0.40 cheaper per gallon than competitors. This strategy allows members to save significantly, especially during periods of rising gas prices. Fuel sales account for a substantial portion of Costco's net sales, enabling the company to maintain smaller margins and pass savings directly to its members.

feed.title: New Amex lounge coming to Charlotte's airport in 2027
feed.summary: American Express is set to open its second-ever Sidecar by The Centurion lounge at Charlotte Douglas International Airport in 2027. This 4,600-square-foot lounge, approved by Charlotte City Council with a $7.15 million investment, will be located in CLT's Concourse A Phase II expansion. Designed with a restaurant-like concept, it will offer small plates, cocktails, and wine accessible via QR code and will cater to travelers within 90 minutes of departure.

feed.title: Applied Materials, Inc. Stock: Semiconductor Equipment Leader Amid AI-Driven Growth and Market Shift
feed.summary: Applied Materials, Inc. is a leading semiconductor manufacturing equipment provider benefiting significantly from the growing demand for AI in logic, DRAM, and HBM segments. The company shows strong financial performance and positive analyst sentiment, with its stock trading at a premium due to AI-driven growth and strategic market positioning. North American investors find it particularly relevant due to its involvement with US-based chip giants and its alignment with the CHIPS Act.

feed.title: ADI (NASDAQ: ADI) insider plans 10,000-share sale; prior Roche sales listed
feed.summary: An affiliate of Analog Devices (ADI) has filed a Form 144 to report a proposed sale of 10,000 shares, originating from an option granted in 2020 and slated for a cash sale on April 1, 2026. The filing also details three previous monthly sales of 10,000 shares each by Vincent T. Roche, with gross proceeds ranging from $1.97 million to $3.5 million, occurring between January and March 2026. This disclosure is a routine regulatory requirement for affiliated holders planning public stock sales.

feed.title: Rep. Jared Moskowitz Sells Off Shares of Roper Technologies, Inc. (NASDAQ:ROP)
feed.summary: Representative Jared Moskowitz (Democratic-Florida) recently disclosed selling between $1,001 and $15,000 worth of Roper Technologies (NASDAQ:ROP) shares on February 27th. The transaction comes as Roper Technologies reported Q4 earnings, issued FY2026 EPS guidance, and declared a quarterly dividend. Analyst ratings for ROP are mixed, with a consensus "Hold" rating, while institutional ownership remains high.

feed.title: Truist Securities Lowers Price Target for Charles Schwab (SCHW)
feed.summary: Truist Securities has lowered its price target for Charles Schwab (SCHW) from $122 to $120, while maintaining a 'Buy' rating. This adjustment by analyst David Smith represents a 1.64% decrease from the previous target. Despite this recent change, analysts generally maintain an "Outperform" status for SCHW, with an average target price of $117.82, suggesting a 27.13% upside from its current price.

feed.title: Thermo Fisher Scientific Launches Integrated Platform to Accelerate Biologics Development
feed.summary: Thermo Fisher Scientific has launched an integrated platform called the Gibco CHOvantage GS Cell Line Development Kit to speed up biologics development. This new platform aims to help manufacturers bring therapies to market faster, improve consistency, and control costs, especially for complex biologics and biosimilars. The kit offers high productivity, streamlined timelines, and royalty-free, clinical-stage licensing options to support scalable manufacturing.

feed.title: Ellucian Named a Leader in the Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Higher Education SaaS Student Information Systems for Second Consecutive Year
feed.summary: Ellucian has been recognized as a Leader in the 2026 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Higher Education SaaS Student Information Systems for the second consecutive year. The company was positioned highest in Ability to Execute and furthest in Completeness of Vision, affirming its student-first and AI-powered innovation strategy. Ellucian Student, its complete solution, combines SaaS-native agility with AI-driven insights to enhance student experiences and institutional operations.

feed.title: RPM Completes Acquisition of Kalzip
feed.summary: RPM International Inc. has acquired Kalzip GmbH, a leader in metal-based roofs and facades, for its Tremco Construction Products Group. Kalzip, known for its aluminum roofing and façade systems, generated approximately €75 million in net sales in calendar year 2024. This acquisition strengthens RPM’s global building envelope portfolio and enhances its market presence.

feed.title: A Look at Agentic AI in the EDA Engineering Workflow
feed.summary: The electronic design automation (EDA) industry is undergoing a significant transformation with the integration of agentic AI into engineering workflows, driven by increasing SoC complexity and talent shortages. This article explores how industry leaders Cadence Design Systems, Siemens EDA, and Synopsys are developing agentic AI platforms, shifting the engineer's role to a high-level strategist managing autonomous systems. It details their approaches, from accelerated compute and workflow orchestration to context-aware reasoning, and how these innovations will shape the future of chip design.

feed.title: SAP Named a Leader in the 2026 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Transportation Management Systems
feed.summary: SAP has been recognized as a Leader in the 2026 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Transportation Management Systems for the 12th consecutive year, highlighting its focus on resilient, efficient, and intelligent transportation operations. The company's solutions, including SAP Transportation Management and SAP Business Network for Logistics, address complex global logistics challenges through integration, AI-driven capabilities, and support for connected logistics landscapes. SAP continues to invest in innovation to help organizations manage operations across various modes, regions, and industries, emphasizing flexibility and end-to-end efficiency.

feed.title: UBS notes tied to Broadcom (AMUB) — $974,000 offering, 17.33% coupon
feed.summary: UBS AG is offering $974,000 in Trigger Autocallable Contingent Yield Notes linked to Broadcom Inc., with a 17.33% annual contingent coupon. These notes mature on April 4, 2029, and offer periodic coupons if Broadcom's stock meets certain barriers, with an early call option. Investors face significant risks, including potential loss of principal if Broadcom's final stock level falls below the downside threshold, and all payments are subject to UBS's credit risk.

feed.title: KKR, Taiyo agree to privatization; KKR enters into agreements with DIC, Kowa
feed.summary: KKR and Taiyo Holdings announced a tender offer for KKR-managed investment funds to acquire all common shares of Taiyo Holdings, which Taiyo Holdings' Board supports. DIC Corporation, Kowa Co., Ltd., and Oasis Management Company Ltd. have agreed to participate, securing support from shareholders representing approximately 42.2% of outstanding shares. The tender offer price is set at JPY 4,750 per common share, with KKR having also finalized agreements with DIC and Kowa for share sales and Taiyo Holdings' founding family planning to re-invest after privatization.

feed.title: Profound Medical Showcases TULSA-PRO at Key Radiology Meeting
feed.summary: Profound Medical (TSE:PRN) will showcase its TULSA-PRO platform at the 2026 Society of Interventional Radiology meeting, highlighting clinical outcomes and early results from their CAPTAIN trial. The company aims to position its incision-free, MRI-guided TULSA Procedure as a mainstream treatment for prostate disease, enhancing its competitive standing. Despite a "Hold" rating from analysts and financial challenges, the company seeks broader adoption through its focus on minimally invasive oncology.

feed.title: Bank of America (BAC) offers 5.55% Fixed Rate Callable Notes due April 20, 2046
feed.summary: Bank of America (BAC) is offering Fixed Rate Callable Notes due April 20, 2046, with an attractive fixed interest rate of 5.55% per annum, payable monthly. The notes are senior, unsecured obligations and may be called by BAC monthly starting April 20, 2029. Investors should be aware that the notes are not FDIC insured and are subject to the credit risk of Bank of America.

feed.title: Thermo Fisher Scientific to Hold Earnings Conference Call on Thursday, April 23, 2026
feed.summary: Thermo Fisher Scientific Inc. (NYSE: TMO) announced it will release its first-quarter 2026 financial results and hold a conference call on Thursday, April 23, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. ET. The call will discuss financial performance and future expectations, accessible via webcast on their website or by phone. A replay of the call will be available until July 22, 2026.

feed.title: Range Resources EVP & CFO Trades $2.41M In Company Stock
feed.summary: Mark Scucchi, EVP & CFO at Range Resources (NYSE: RRC), recently made an insider purchase of 50,563 shares for $2,409,326. This transaction signals positive anticipation for the stock's future. The company shows strong revenue growth and a balanced debt approach, despite a market capitalization below industry averages.

feed.title: REX American Resources CFO Sold $227K In Company Stock
feed.summary: Douglas Bruggeman, CFO at REX American Resources (NYSE: REX), sold 5,000 shares of the company's stock for a total of $227,049 on April 1, according to an SEC filing. Despite this insider sell, the article notes that such transactions don't always indicate a bearish outlook and should be considered alongside other investment criteria. The company's stock was trading down 5.35% at $45.5 at the time of the writing, while its financial overview showed a decline in revenue, a balanced debt-to-equity ratio, and a market capitalization below industry average.

feed.title: Chairman and CEO At ConocoPhillips Sells $15.03M Of Stock
feed.summary: Michael Ryan Lance, Chairman and CEO of ConocoPhillips, reported an insider sell on March 31, amounting to 113,221 shares of ConocoPhillips stock with a total value of $15,025,389. The article details ConocoPhillips's financial performance, noting a decline in revenue, a strong debt-to-equity ratio, and a robust market capitalization. It also provides an overview of how insider transactions are viewed in investment analysis.

feed.title: BigPanda Partners with ServiceNow to Extend ServiceNow with Advanced Event Intelligence and Incident Automation
feed.summary: BigPanda announced a strategic partnership with ServiceNow, becoming an elite Build Partner. This collaboration introduces a certified ServiceNow application designed to significantly reduce alert noise and accelerate incident resolution within enterprise IT operations. The integration aims to transform high-volume alert streams into actionable, context-rich incidents directly within ServiceNow, leading to improvements in operational efficiency and service reliability for joint customers like Sony Interactive Entertainment.

feed.title: ServiceNow to Announce First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on April 22
feed.summary: ServiceNow (NYSE: NOW) announced it will release its first quarter financial results for the period ending March 31, 2026, after market close on Wednesday, April 22, 2026. The company will host a conference call and live webcast at 2 p.m. Pacific Time (21:00 GMT) on the same day to discuss these results. Details for accessing the call and webcast replay have been provided.

feed.title: ConocoPhillips Stock: Navigating Oil Market Dynamics and Strategic Positioning for North American In
feed.summary: ConocoPhillips maintains a strong position in global oil and gas exploration, characterized by disciplined capital allocation and a focus on high-return projects across its North American and international assets. The company prioritizes shareholder returns through dividends and buybacks, while investing in technological advancements and sustainability efforts. Its competitive edge stems from low breakeven costs, diversified production, and a strong balance sheet, making it an attractive option for North American investors seeking exposure to the independent E&P sector.

feed.title: Insider sells 5,213 shares at MCO (NYSE: MCO) — multiple January–March 2026 trades
feed.summary: An insider at Moody's Corporation (MCO), Robert Fauber, has sold a total of 5,213 shares on March 3, 2026, for over $2.38 million. This Form 144 filing also details multiple smaller open-market dispositions of shares in January and February 2026, alongside entries for restricted stock vesting and option exercises. The filing provides transparency on insider transactions and their potential impact on the stock.

feed.title: GNRC (NYSE: GNRC) insider sales: 15,000 shares sold across Q1 2026
feed.summary: A Form 144 filing for Generac Holdings Inc. (GNRC) reports a proposed stock option exercise to sell 5,000 shares for cash, dated November 13, 2024. Additionally, the filing details three executed sales by Aaron Jagdfeld, totaling 15,000 shares, that occurred throughout the first quarter of 2026. These sales generated gross proceeds of $689,900 on January 2, $834,550 on February 2, and $1,084,750 on March 5, 2026, with Fidelity Brokerage Services LLC listed as the brokerage.

feed.title: Rocket Lab Is Up 15x in Two Years. Is It Too Late?
feed.summary: Rocket Lab's stock (RKLB) has seen a significant 15x increase over the past two years, reaching $64 per share. This surge is attributed to growing orbital launches, the anticipated IPO of SpaceX, and increased government allocation to space projects. Despite the substantial gains, the article argues that it is not too late to invest, citing potential for further growth due to structural tailwinds and a recovery from recent dips.

feed.title: Yum! Brands (YUM) Appoints Kathleen K. Oberg to Board of Directors
feed.summary: Yum! Brands, Inc. (YUM) has appointed Kathleen K. Oberg to its Board of Directors, effective April 1, 2026, a move aimed at enhancing the company's corporate governance and leadership. Ms. Oberg will receive a one-time stock grant and a prorated annual stock retainer, with her election subject to shareholder approval at the upcoming Annual Meeting. The company believes her experience will contribute significantly to its strategic direction and future endeavors.

feed.title: Reservoir Media strengthens artist roster with Sam Tinnesz collaboration
feed.summary: Reservoir Media has expanded its global music presence by adding singer-songwriter Sam Tinnesz to its roster. Tinnesz is recognized for creating music widely used across film, television, and streaming platforms. This move follows Reservoir's recent expansion of its publishing portfolio with composer Hans Zimmer, demonstrating its strategy to strengthen its music publishing business with diverse talent.

feed.title: Hasbro (HAS) Reports Cybersecurity Incident: Investigation and M
feed.summary: Hasbro (HAS) has reported an unauthorized network access identified on March 28, 2026. The company has launched an investigation with third-party experts, implemented containment measures, and put interim measures in place to maintain operations, though some delays are expected. Hasbro is reviewing potentially impacted files and plans to implement additional security measures while providing necessary notifications to stakeholders.

feed.title: Mizuho Raises Price Target on EOG to $147 While Maintaining Neut
feed.summary: Mizuho analyst Nitin Kumar has increased the price target for EOG Resources (EOG) to $147 from $146, while maintaining a Neutral rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects a modest 0.68% increase in their target. Other analysts have also recently updated their ratings and price targets for EOG, with an average target price of $144.27 from 31 analysts, implying a 1.61% upside from the current price.

feed.title: Alphabet (GOOGL) Stock — Two Analysts Raise Price Targets While CLO Offloads $2.4M
feed.summary: Alphabet's CLO, John Kent Walker, offloaded approximately $2.48 million in Class C shares, despite the stock's 84% return over the past year. In parallel, Needham reiterated a Buy rating with a $400 price target, and Wells Fargo raised its price target to $397, citing Alphabet's strong position in the AI sector and the recent $32 billion acquisition of cloud security platform Wiz. Google is also rolling out updates to its Gemini AI assistant and new developer tools.

feed.title: NYSE Content Update: Versigent To Ring Opening Bell As its Shares Debut for Trade
feed.summary: Versigent (NYSE: VGNT) is set to ring the Opening Bell at the New York Stock Exchange as its shares begin trading following its spinoff from Aptiv (NYSE: APTV). The pre-market update from NYSE also includes insights from TD Synnex CFO David Jordan on their financial results and Public.com Co-CEO Jannick Malling discussing AI agents for investor portfolios. The article highlights market activities and several other company updates from the investing news network on April 1, 2026.

feed.title: Why Rave Restaurant Group cut ties with Uber Eats
feed.summary: Rave Restaurant Group, owner of Pizza Inn and Pie Five, canceled its partnership with Uber Eats after the delivery platform unilaterally increased its marketplace fees. CEO Brandon Solano stated that the price hike was poorly timed and would leave restaurant operators with little to no profit from delivery transactions. Rave Restaurant Group plans to focus on dine-in experiences, value offerings, and direct ordering, having already seen consistent profitability and growth in these areas.

feed.title: Seagate shares jump as bullish new coverage and AI-storage outlook fuel optimism
feed.summary: Seagate Technology Holdings plc (STX) shares rose 7.3% following new bullish analyst coverage emphasizing strong demand for AI storage and valuation upside, complementing recent positive earnings. JPMorgan initiated coverage with an Overweight rating and a $525 price target, highlighting structurally stronger nearline HDD demand and improving margins. The company's recent earnings also pointed to AI-driven data growth as a key demand driver.

feed.title: Teledyne EXtreamer Receives 2026 Spotlight On New Technology Award
feed.summary: Teledyne Geophysical Instruments' eXtreamer, an advanced seismic streamer developed with Geometrics Inc., has won the 2026 Spotlight on New Technology Award from the Offshore Technology Conference (OTC). This award recognizes the system's innovative approach to ultra-high-resolution (UHR) and ultra-ultra-high-resolution (UUHR) marine seismic data acquisition, highlighting its durability, flexibility, and operational efficiency. The eXtreamer is designed to meet modern seismic standards while reducing downtime and overall costs for offshore energy applications.

feed.title: Is Wabtec (WAB) Starting To Look Stretched After Strong Multi‑Year Share Price Gains
feed.summary: Westinghouse Air Brake Technologies (WAB) has seen significant share price gains over the multi-year period, but a recent valuation suggests the stock might be overvalued. A Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis estimates WAB's intrinsic value at $221.41 per share, indicating it is about 12.9% above this estimate, while its P/E ratio of 36.52x, compared to an industry average of 26.57x and a peer average of 20.40x, suggests it's priced at a higher multiple. However, "Fair Ratio" analysis places it closer to fair value at 35.89x.

feed.title: (PLPC) Risk Channels and Responsive Allocation
feed.summary: This article from Stock Traders Daily discusses Preformed Line Products Company (PLPC), noting weak near-term sentiment but strong mid and long-term outlooks, with an exceptional 34.3:1 risk-reward setup. It outlines three AI-generated trading strategies—Position, Momentum Breakout, and Risk Hedging—tailored for different risk profiles and holding periods, based on multi-timeframe signal analysis. The piece also highlights the availability of real-time signals, API integration, and custom risk models for institutional-grade analysis.

feed.title: CPI Card Group Inc. (PMTS) Lags Q2 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
feed.summary: CPI Card Group Inc. (PMTS) reported its second-quarter earnings, missing both Zacks Consensus Estimates for earnings and revenue. The company posted adjusted earnings per share of $0.09, which was 55% lower than the consensus estimate of $0.20, and revenues of $105.7 million, falling short of the $110.8 million estimate. This marks the first time in the last four quarters the company has missed earnings estimates.

feed.title: Ryanair (RYAAY) confirms 1.04B voting shares outstanding
feed.summary: Ryanair Holdings plc has confirmed that as of March 31, 2026, its issued share capital consists of 1,043,931,708 Ordinary Shares, each with a nominal value of €0.006. The company holds no Ordinary Shares in treasury, meaning the total number of shares carrying voting rights is also 1,043,931,708. This figure is provided so shareholders can comply with transparency regulations regarding the notification of their shareholdings.

feed.title: Looking for work? PG&E is hiring for 2 Diablo Canyon outages
feed.summary: PG&E is hosting an Outage Hiring Information Fair on Thursday, April 2, at Embassy Suites in San Luis Obispo, seeking to fill positions for two upcoming refueling outages at the Diablo Canyon Power Plant in fall 2026 and spring 2027. The fair will cover outage jobs, full-time PG&E positions, veterans' programs, and opportunities with business partners, encouraging attendees to bring their resumes. Diablo Canyon is California's largest source of clean energy, and temporary staff are crucial during these maintenance periods.
